name: Sniper
description: Kardel Sharpeye, the Sniper Locks onto a unit-targeted enemy. After a short aiming duration, Sniper fires a devastating shot at long range and mini-stuns the target.

abilities.name: Shrapnel
abilities.description: Kardel's modular rifle also fires incendiary rounds, useful for assaulting entrenched locations. Cast Range: 1800. Effect Radius: 400/425/450/475. Damage per Second: 30/45/60/75 (39/58/78/97). Move Speed Slow: 12%/18%/24%/30%. Shrapnel Duration: 10. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5. Mana Cost: 35.

abilities.name: Headshot
abilities.description: Grants Sniper a chance to deal extra damage and briefly knocks back the attacked enemy unit. Proc Chance: 40%. Damage: 20/50/80/110 (50/80/110/140). Max Knock Distance: 50 (100). Knock Duration: 0.033. Move Speed Slow: 100%. Attack Speed Slow: 100.

abilities.name: Take Aim
abilities.description: Passively increases Sniper's attack range. Attack Range Bonus: 100/150/200/250 (150/200/250/300). Move Speed Slow: 45%/40%/35%/30%. Set Vision Radius: 140°. Vision Bonus: 500/750/1000/1250. Duration: 3 (5). Attack Speed Bonus: (45). Cooldown: 20/18/16/14. Mana Cost: 50.

abilities.name: Concussive Grenade
abilities.description: Damages, stuns, and applies a knockback to all affected enemy units within the area-targeted location. Disarms, and applies a movement speed slow to affected enemy units after the knockback. Cast Range: 600. Effect Radius: 375. Damage: 200. Knock Distance: 475. Knock Duration: 0.4. Stun Duration: 0.4. Mana Cost: 10.

abilities.name: Assassinate
abilities.description: Locks onto a unit-targeted enemy. After a short aiming duration, Sniper fires a devastating shot at long range and mini-stuns the target. Assassinate now fires quicker and stuns the enemy target. Reduces cast point. Cast Range: 3000. Cast Range Buffer: 600. Spell Damage: 300/400/500 (450/550/650). Stun Duration: 0.033 (0.8/1/1.2). Vision Max Duration: 4. Cooldown on Kill: 0. Cooldown: 20/15/10. Mana Cost: 175.
